form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 525m at The Meadows behind Cash In View beaten 10 lengths (30.96). Was in the money two on end before missing the frame last time. Worth another try.

form.formComment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but she does have good record over this track and distance. Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at the last two runs, both at Sandown, the latest when beaten 5 lengths behind Silver Mack over 515m. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th over 450m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (26.32) behind Go Pikachu in a Grade 5 on April 6. Has a fast 31.09 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.
